blocks.text: Kelly Klein, John Johnson, Jeff Pope --

Thanks for yesterday's session. Short version: we are on track, and nothing in the early findings changes the shape of the work for {{fact:f:E-2022-001.client}}. The deck is attached; Kelly, feel free to share it with the wider Vance and Sons team.

Two asks. Kelly, we still need the distributor introductions your office is holding; Jeff will send the final list Monday, please confirm the three we flagged. John is waiting on the regional volume file to close out the model, same timing.
Next update stays on the standing call. Shout if anything above needs to move.
